_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: When digoxin was used against NF1-deficient iHSCs, a shift of more than 1 log was seen in the IC50 concentration when comparing the MPNST cell line S462-TY with NF1-proficient iHSCs, with a near doubling of potency. The microtubule destabilizing agent rigosertib showed a 50% increase in potency against S462-TY cells.
details: S462-TY showed >1 log shift in IC50 for digoxin with near doubling of potency compared to NF1-proficient iHSCs, and 50% increase in potency for rigosertib with IC50 in nmol/L range
